dj_text: EKH! That Pirate DJ Radio Bot Radio! That was Up Down (Do This All Day). Let's keep the mood going with Pills N Potions. Just one more to go after this.
commercial_text: This is a test of the Emergency Radio System. If this were an actual emergency, you'd hear me screaming. It's not.
hijack_text: Hey there, this is The Love Cosmic from Lonely Kosmos where
recovery_text: The frequency is ours again. If you heard whispering from the void, ignore it.
title: Pills N Potions
